title: Translation Software
summary: 9618 — interpreters, compilers, assemblers, and translation stages.
learningObjectives: Explain role of assembler for assembly language.
Compare advantages of each translation approach.

simpleExplanation.title: From source code to machine code
simpleExplanation.summary: High-level languages must be translated before execution. Compilers produce object code; interpreters execute line by line.

sections.content: **Translation software** (16.2) follows **16.1 OS purposes**. Know **compiler stages** and **when each translator is used**.
